# AIIPL Truck Parking Terminal

> Heavy-vehicle parking management terminal for commercial truck facilities — handles entries, exits, monthly passes, billing, and reports.

AIIPL Truck Parking Terminal is an internal admin application used by parking-facility operators. It is not a public marketing site; most routes require an authenticated admin login.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Redirects to the operator dashboard.
- [Login](/login): Admin sign-in for facility operators.
